charts.title: ✓ Validation PASS — reproduces the paper's behaviour
charts.caption: Light cells slough off and disperse into the medium
charts.simulations: Validation report card. The PASS/FAIL badge is the result of an automated acceptance test (pbg_cpm_studies.gg1993.validate) evaluated against this study's own reproduced metric time series — not a hand-set verdict. light-medium fraction rises ≥3× and total boundary length increases (fragmentation)

charts.title: Fig 25
charts.caption: light-cell sloughing/dispersal at 480 MCS.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Light cells disperse as isolated cells into the medium while dark cells remain compact and round (Fig 25).
